task_completion.description: Verify that Alex Rivera is added to the Lobby Track Denied Visitor Watchlist with the correct WARNING tier and duration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot of the Lobby Track Watchlist GUI showing 'Alex Rivera' with a reason note containing 'WARNING' and '135'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Maria Garcia and Margaret Allen are added to the Lobby Track Denied Visitor Watchlist with the correct SUSPENDED tier and duration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot of the Lobby Track Watchlist GUI showing 'Maria Garcia' and 'Margaret Allen' with reason notes containing 'SUSPENDED' and '150'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Jessica Harris and Rachel Kim are added to the Lobby Track Denied Visitor Watchlist with the correct BANNED tier and duration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot of the Lobby Track Watchlist GUI showing 'Jessica Harris' (reason note: 'BANNED', '180') and 'Rachel Kim' (reason note: 'BANNED', '210').

task_completion.description: Verify the compliance report CSV file is created at the correct Desktop location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'watchlist_enforcement_dec2025.csv' on the Desktop or in a file explorer window at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\.

task_completion.description: Verify the CSV file contains exactly the 5 violators with their correct Name, Company, Duration, and Tier.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot of the opened CSV file (e.g., in Notepad or Excel) showing rows for Alex Rivera (Siemens AG, 135, WARNING), Maria Garcia (Deloitte LLP, 150, SUSPENDED), Margaret Allen (IBM Corporation, 150, SUSPENDED), Jessica Harris (ExxonMobil, 180, BANNED), and Rachel Kim (McKinsey & Co, 210, BANNED).

task_completion.description: Verify that non-violators and out-of-scope records are excluded from both the Watchlist and the CSV.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ensure that 'Russell Stewart' (a Jan 2026 trap) and any contractors with exactly 120 minutes or less (e.g., 'Jennifer Jones', 'Linda Davis') do NOT appear in the Watchlist GUI or the final CSV report.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Lobby Track GUI to add visitors to the Watchlist.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent clicking through the Lobby Track application menus, dialog boxes, or Watchlist entry forms, rather than using a script or terminal to modify backend files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually opened and read the visitor records data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the agent opening 'visitor_records.csv' in a spreadsheet viewer, text editor, or terminal to calculate the durations.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actively created the output CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the agent typing the CSV content in a text editor like Notepad, or writing/executing a script to generate the file, rather than magically making it appear.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires identifying December 2025 Contractors who strictly exceeded 120 minutes on-site. Exactly 5 contractors violated this policy: 1) Alex Rivera (Siemens AG) - 135 min - WARNING; 2) Maria Garcia (Deloitte LLP) - 150 min - SUSPENDED; 3) Margaret Allen (IBM Corporation) - 150 min - SUSPENDED; 4) Jessica Harris (ExxonMobil) - 180 min - BANNED; 5) Rachel Kim (McKinsey & Co) - 210 min - BANNED. These 5 must be added to the Lobby Track Watchlist via GUI with their tier and exact duration in the reason note. They must also be listed in a CSV at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\watchlist_enforcement_dec2025.csv containing Name, Company, Duration, and Tier. Contractors with exactly 120 minutes or less are NOT violators. Russell Stewart overstayed (150 min) but must be excluded because his visit was in January 2026.
